debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ range (HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A) = 𝒫 A

proof:
by
  apply Set.ext; intro S
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨X, rfl⟩ y ⟨x, _, rfl⟩
    exact x.property
  · intro h
    refine ⟨{x | x.val ∈ S}, Set.ext fun y ↦ ⟨?_, ?_⟩⟩
    · rintro ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩; exact hx
    · intro hy; exact ⟨⟨y, h hy⟩, hy, rfl⟩
failed_attempts:
by
  apply Set.ext; intro S
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro ⟨X, hX⟩ y ⟨x, _, hx⟩
    rw [← hX, ← hx]
    exact x.property
  · intro h
    exists {x : A | x.val ∈ S}
    apply Set.ext; intro y
    constructor
    · intro ⟨x, hx, hy⟩
      rw [← hy]; exact hx
    · intro hy
      exists ⟨y, h hy⟩
      exact ⟨hy, rfl⟩

by
  apply set_ext; intro S
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := h
    rw [← hX]
    intro y hy
    obtain ⟨x, _, hx⟩ := hy
    rw [← hx]
    exact x.property
  · intro hS
    exists {x : A | x.val ∈ S}
    apply set_ext; intro y
    constructor
    · intro hy
      obtain ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ := hy
      exact hx
    · intro hy
      exact ⟨⟨y, hS hy⟩, hy, rfl⟩

by
  apply Set.ext; intro S
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h; cases h with | intro X hX =>
    rw [← hX]; intro y hy; cases hy with | intro x hx =>
    cases hx with | intro _ hxy =>
    rw [← hxy]; exact x.property
  · intro h
    exists {x : A | x.val ∈ S}
    apply Set.ext; intro y; apply Iff.intro
    · intro hy; cases hy with | intro x hx =>
      cases hx with | intro hS hxy =>
      rw [← hxy]; exact hS
    · intro hy; exists ⟨y, h hy⟩; exact ⟨hy, rfl⟩

by
  apply set_ext; intro S
  apply Iff.intro
  · rintro ⟨X, rfl⟩ y ⟨x, -, rfl⟩
    exact x.property
  · intro h
    exists {x | x.val ∈ S}
    apply set_ext; intro y
    apply Iff.intro
    · rintro ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      exact hx
    · intro hy
      exact ⟨⟨y, h y hy⟩, hy, rfl⟩

by
  apply Set.ext; intro S
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    cases h with X hX
    rw [←hX]
    intro y hy
    cases hy with x hx
    cases hx with hx1 hx2
    rw [←hx2]
    exact x.property
  · intro hS
    exists {x : A | x.val ∈ S}
    apply Set.ext; intro y
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro hy
      cases hy with x hx
      cases hx with hx1 hx2
      rw [←hx2]
      exact hx1
    · intro hyS
      exists ⟨y, hS hyS⟩
      exact ⟨hyS, rfl⟩
